description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the templates/gitlab-ci-buildpkg.yml and templates/gitlab-ci-buildpkg-all-distrib.yml files from the Orange-Opensource/gitlab-buildpkg project, and defines the variable PKG_BUILD_SUFFIX_MODE with the value short. The pipeline relies entirely on the jobs, stages, caches, and artifacts declared in those external templates. No local jobs, stages, or additional configuration are added beyond the includes and the variable definition.
